zh.Rhode Island, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lieutnant John Woodman於大約1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓時，他的父親John Woodman29歲，母親Elizabeth Green25歲。他於1675年10月3日與Hannah Timberlake在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓被列為town clerk。他去世於1713年4月24日在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓武德曼 其特利。

zh-hans.Rhode Island, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lieutnant John Woodman于大约1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓时，他的父亲John Woodman29岁，母亲Elizabeth Green25岁。他于1675年10月3日与Hannah Timberlake在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓被列为town clerk。他去世于1713年4月24日在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓武德曼 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Woodman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

variants.name: Woodward
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.
Oldest grave seen in the memorial list

en.lifeSummary: When Lieutnant John Woodman was born about 1637, in Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, John Woodman, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Green, was 25. He married Hannah Timberlake on 3 October 1675, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as town clerk in Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 24 April 1713, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lieutnant John Woodman est né environ 1637, à Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Woodman, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Green, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Timberlake le 3 octobre 1675, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est town clerk à Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1713, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lieutnant John Woodman um 1637 in Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Woodman 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Green 25. Er hat am 3. Oktober 1675 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Hannah Timberlake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als town clerk in Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. April 1713 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lieutnant John Woodman è nato il circa 1637 nel Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John Woodman, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Green, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Timberlake il 3 ottobre 1675, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come town clerk nel Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 24 aprile 1713, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lieutnant John Woodmanが約1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルリットル コンプトンで生まれた時，父John Woodmanは29歳，母Elizabeth Greenは25歳であった。1675年10月3日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンでHannah Timberlakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルリットル コンプトンでの職業はtown clerkと記録されている。彼は1713年4月24日に故郷で77歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンウッドマン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lieutnant John Woodman(이)가 대략 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Woodman(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Green(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1675년 10월 3일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 Hannah Timberlake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴에서 town clerk이었다. 그는 1713년 4월 24일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴 우드먼 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lieutnant John Woodman nasceu aproximadamente 1637, em Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Woodman, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Green, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Timberlake em 3 de outubro de 1675, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como town clerk em Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1713, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lieutnant John Woodman родился около 1637 г. в местности литл комптон, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Woodman было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Green, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Timberlake 3 октября 1675 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии town clerk в местности литл комптон, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 24 апреля 1713 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности вудмен кеметири, литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lieutnant John Woodman nació aproximadamente 1637, en Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Woodman, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Green, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hannah Timberlake el 3 de octubre de 1675, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era town clerk en Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 24 de abril de 1713, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
